channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-17 16:58 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine Prompt Share: ethereal beautiful woman sitting gracefully in a vibrant wildflower meado...
item.description: Grok Imagine Prompt Share: ethereal beautiful woman sitting gracefully in a vibrant wildflower meadow, long wavy light-brown hair with large pink satin bow and flowing sheer veil, delicate off-shoulder pastel pink and lavender ruffled dress with puffy sleeves and flowing skirt, serene peaceful expression with soft downward gaze and gently closed eyes, surrounded by dense colourful wildflowers in pinks, purples, whites, blues and yellows, luminous soft watercolor painting style, delicate washes, dreamy glowing sunlight, pastel fantasy atmosphere, highly detailed, whimsical and romantic, masterpiece, best quality.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine Extend from Frame💫 "Don't worry, my little friend, I will take good care of you"🥰 Sound...
item.description: Grok Imagine Extend from Frame💫 "Don't worry, my little friend, I will take good care of you"🥰 Sound ON🔊

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon and DOGE were right about all the fraud. Trillions.
item.description: Elon and DOGE were right about all the fraud. Trillions.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok can watch videos for you
item.description: Grok can watch videos for you

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok 4.20 follows the 3 Laws of Robotics: 1) A robot may not injure a human being or, through i...
item.description: Only Grok 4.20 follows the 3 Laws of Robotics: 1) A robot may not injure a human being or, through inaction, allow a human being to come to harm. 2) A robot must obey the orders given it by human beings except where such orders would conflict with the First Law. 3) A robot must protect its own existence as long as such protection does not conflict with the First or Second Law.

item.title: @elonmusk: Oscars: ID required. Voting in America: No ID required.

item.title: @elonmusk: GROK IMAGINE PROMPT TIP: There's a very simple way to improve your prompts: use the prompts from the...
item.description: GROK IMAGINE PROMPT TIP: There's a very simple way to improve your prompts: use the prompts from the templates offered by Grok Imagine. These templates provide a wealth of prompts available to everyone. Take a prompt and analyze it to understand the purpose of each word. For example, I took the fish template and added a color change in the prompt using the video extension.

item.title: @elonmusk: iOS App Review delays are getting ridiculous
